anti_claim: Batch 10 Frontend Work/Market Cockpit imports exact non-secret TS/TSX source bodies for WorkLens, MarketCockpit, MarketIntelligenceLens, and their source tests, then audits their read-only work-state and honest market-signal contracts over public fixtures. It is not a browser run, not frontend release approval, not Task Ledger or Work Ledger mutation authority, not market advice, and not proof of live UI correctness.

allowed_public_inputs: public frontend source-module ids and source refs
public negative-case ids and stable error codes
exact copied non-secret TS/TSX source modules under source_modules
source refs, digests, line counts, and required anchors
bounded synthetic fixture inputs and outcomes
forbidden_public_inputs: private home-path literals copied from source
live Task Ledger or Work Ledger mutation authority
investment advice or live market advice

standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe frontend source-open capsule that imports Work Lens and Market Cockpit TS/TSX source bodies and validates their read-only work-state and honest market-signal boundaries.
standard_payload.teleology: Let a cold reader inspect and rerun representative frontend cockpit mechanics without inheriting live UI correctness, browser/provider access, ledger mutation, release/publication, source mutation, or market-advice authority.
standard_payload.anti_purpose: Receipt-only claims, live UI correctness, Task Ledger or Work Ledger mutation authority, provider dispatch, release or publication signaling, private-root equivalence, source mutation, or investment advice.
failure_modes: source module count drifts from five without manifest and test updates
copied source module digest does not match macro source digest
copied source module lacks required anchors
work lens checks stop enforcing read-only ledger boundaries
market cockpit checks allow fake time-series or recommendation language
private source refs or private path literals enter public manifests or receipts
negative-case fixtures become verdict authority instead of labels paired to computed outcomes
receipts include copied body text, raw operator transcripts, provider/browser state, credentials, live ledger state, private paths, or release/publication state

contract_projection_basis.authority_boundary: computed standard-lattice contract only; existing authority_ceiling remains the operative claim ceiling.

validation_rules: require exactly 5 copied frontend source modules
verify source-to-target digest equality and required anchors for every copied source module
require work-lens live-state checks to remain read-only and mutation-boundary aware
require market-cockpit checks to reject fake time-series and recommendation-language overclaim
require private frontend source refs to be rejected
require stable negative-case codes for all 4 negative cases while treating fixtures as labels, not verdict authority

keep live UI correctness, browser/provider authority, Task Ledger or Work Ledger mutation, source mutation, publication, release, market advice, private-root equivalence, and whole-system correctness authority false
keep copied source bodies under source_modules only; receipts may expose refs, digests, anchors, counts, verdicts, and omission receipts but not body text

author.purpose: create a valid Batch 10 frontend Work/Market cockpit capsule instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Batch 10 frontend Work/Market cockpit capsule without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_batch10_frontend_work_market_cockpit_capsule and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections

source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)

doctrine_kind_envelope.note: This standard conforms to the universal doctrine-kind envelope; markdown, Mermaid, Atlas, coverage, health, and entry-card views are generated projections of this JSON source.

anti_claims: Batch 10 Frontend Work/Market Cockpit imports exact non-secret TS/TSX source bodies for WorkLens, MarketCockpit, MarketIntelligenceLens, and their source tests, then audits their read-only work-state and honest market-signal contracts over public fixtures. It is not a browser run, not frontend release approval, not Task Ledger or Work Ledger mutation authority, not market advice, and not proof of live UI correctness.

Active v2 standard status is a source JSON contract state only; it does not expand release, publication, provider dispatch, private-root equivalence, product-readiness, or whole-system correctness authority beyond the authority_ceiling.

runtime_acceptance_refs.uplift_basis: registry-backed source standard already carried accepted, active, source-body-import, or body-floor status; this update narrows it into the active v2 JSON contract shape without raising its authority ceiling.
